---
title: "Pathological features and algorithm"
format: html
---

## Pathological features

| Ultrasound finding | Pneumothorax | Pleural effusion | Pulmonary edema | Pneumonia |
|:--------------|:-------------:|:-------------:|:-------------:|:-------------:|
| A-lines | — | — | — | — |
| B-lines[^pathological-features-1] | ⊘ | — | \+ | \+ |
| Lung sliding | ⊘ | — | — | — |
| Lung pulse | ⊘ | — | — | — |
| Lung point | ✓ | — | — | — |
| Spine sign[^pathological-features-2] | — | ✓ | ++ | \+ |
| Lung condensation | — | ++ | \+ | ++ |

: Diagnostic contribution of common lung ultrasound findings.\
—: no diagnostic value. ⊘: rules out. ✓: rules in. +/++ in favor/strongly in favor.

[^pathological-features-1]: B-lines in pulmonary edema are usually approximately symetric and declive, whether assymetric focal in pneumonia.

[^pathological-features-2]: Pleural effusion is more frequent in pulmonary edema than in pneumonia, and is usually approximately symetrical in pulmonary edema, and assymetrical in pneumonia.

## Algorithm

This original algorithm is an adaptation from previously published versions, notably @lichtenstein2008 and @demi2023.


```{mermaid}
%%{init: {"flowchart": {"curve": "bumpY"}} }%%

flowchart TD

A(Acute dyspnea) --> B(["Lung sliding? <br/> Lung pulse? <br/> B-lines?"])

B -->|Any| C[Pneumothorax excluded]

B -->|None| D([Lung point?])

D --> |No| E["Pneumothorax likely <br/> confirm with CXR/CT"]

D --> |Yes| F[Pneumothorax confirmed]

C --> G(["B-lines? <br/> Effusion? <br/> Condensation?"])

G --> |No| H["Normal pattern: <br/> Normal, PE, asthma, COPD"]

G --> |Yes| I["Compare patterns for: <br/> Pneumonia, <br/> cardiogenic edema, <br/> isolated effusion"]

I --> J(["Consider cardiac US for <br/> evaluation of cardiogenic component"])

classDef state fill:#F3F4F6,stroke:#9CA3AF,color:#4B5563,stroke-width:1px;
classDef action fill:#E8F1FF,stroke:#4A90E2,color:#1E3A8A,stroke-width:1px;
classDef test fill:#FFF3E0,stroke:#E69500,color:#9A5A00,stroke-width:1px;
classDef decision fill:#FFF9D9,stroke:#D4A017,color:#7A5C00,stroke-width:1px;
classDef outcome fill:#EAF4FF,stroke:#5B8DEF,color:#1E40AF,stroke-width:1px;

class A,C state;
class B,D,G,J test;
class E,F,H,I outcome;
```


## References
